field_values.action_summary: A group of Apache warriors approaches the cave entrance. They are suddenly terrified by a low, unnatural moaning sound emanating from the darkness. In their panicked flight, one warrior falls from the cliffside.
field_values.emotional_beat: Bravery/Curiosity to Primal Terror and Chaos.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the gorge/cliff; Medium shots of warriors reacting to sound; Handheld/Shaky cam for panic and fall
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Starlight lighting consistency across all shots
Precise synchronization of moaning sound with character reaction beats
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the presence of an unseen horror through the visceral terror and chaotic flight of a group of Apache warriors. The scene must transition from controlled movement to primal panic, utilizing starlight as the primary light source to emphasize shadows and the unknown within the cave darkness.

## Required Cast
- apache_warriors (Group)

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_nightscape (Cave Entrance / Rocky Gorge)

## Continuity Constraints
- Starlight lighting consistency across all shots
- Precise synchronization of moaning sound with character reaction beats

## Beat List
- BT001: Warriors approach the cave entrance with curiosity/bravery.
- BT002: Unnatural moaning sound triggers terror.
- BT003: Panic and chaotic flight leads to a fall.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
